{{Quote|My buddy Raine is right over there. He's a decent trader and I'm sure that he'd be willing to give you some materials, if you show him your technique.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TT" />}}
'''Raine Taske''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Merchant/Legends|trader]] and [[Artisan/Legends|artisan]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I would like to learn more from you, if you are willing.|Raine Taske, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:StAoCC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Trader|Sharing the Art of Crafting: Clothing|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>}}
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Raine Taske resided on board [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]].<ref name="SWG:TT" /> He often worked with the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] vendor [[Jesi (vendor)|Jesi]] who provided him resources to craft various kinds of items.<ref name="SWG:StAoCC" /><ref name="SWG:StAoCF">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Trader|Sharing the Art of Crafting: Food|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref><ref name="SWG:StAoCST">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Trader|Sharing the Art of Crafting: Surveying Tools|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a spacer who was himself an artisan arrived on the station aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] along with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. Since Raine Taske was an old buddy of his, Solo recommended the spacer work with the trader. The spacer therefore met Raine, and both agreed with sharing their crafting skills.<ref name="SWG:TT" /> First, Taske asked the spacer to help the bartender of the station's cantina prepare some drinks.<ref name="SWG:TtC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Trader|Teaching the Craft|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref> The spacer later returned to Taske, and the two traders started to work together. The spacer taught Raine Taske to craft clothing,<ref name="SWG:StAoCC" /> make food, namely [[bofa treat]]s,<ref name="SWG:StAoCF" /> and produce mineral and flora survey tools.<ref name="SWG:StAoCST" /><ref name="SWG:CAUT">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Trader|Creating Another Useful Tool|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Raine Taske appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TT" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Raine Taske was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:TT" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
